name: The Map Is Not The Territory
what_it_is: Every framework, model, and mental map is a simplification of reality - useful precisely because it simplifies, dangerous when mistaken for complete truth.
core_mechanic: When applying any framework, ask: "What is this leaving out?" and "Under what conditions would this model give the wrong answer?" Treat framework output as a starting point for judgment, not the end point.
when_to_use: Every session. This is a meta-principle not a standalone framework.
when_not_to_use: N/A - always relevant at least as a background check.
ideaos_application: Agent 3 includes a one-sentence "map limitation" note at the end of every framework application: what this framework cannot see that may still be relevant.
